## Summary
The code in src/pagination.py has issues with input validation and off-by-one error in the end index calculation.

## Performance Observations
None found.

## Edge Cases
The function get_page in src/pagination.py does not handle the case where page_number or page_size is less than 1.

## Security & Correctness Issues
The function get_page in src/pagination.py does not handle invalid page numbers and sizes, which could lead to incorrect results.

## Architectural Suggestions
The current implementation in src/pagination.py has an off-by-one error in the end index calculation and lacks input validation for page numbers and sizes.

## Validation Outcome
None found.
